updateNote: Day 63 Noon PT refresh — War Powers 60-day deadline expires; Trump declares 'hostilities terminated.' Trump rejects Iran's Pakistan-mediated proposal: 'blast the hell out of them or make a deal.' 14 IRGC killed in Zanjan UXO blast (largest IRGC death since ceasefire). IDF destroys 40+ Hezbollah sites in 24h, seized 7,500 weapons; 10+ killed in S. Lebanon strikes (Habboush evacuation). Lebanon war toll 2,618 killed/8,094 wounded. CENTCOM directs 44 vessels to turn around. Treasury warns shippers against paying Iran tolls. State Dept sanctions Qingdao Haiye Oil Terminal. UAE OPEC exit IN EFFECT. Brent retreats to $108.10 (+35.4%, -$5.91 from morning $114.01) on Pakistan talks; WTI $101.05 (+33.8%). AAA gas $4.39 holds at wartime high. Hormuz Day 60.
dataFreshnessWarning: Data current as of 12:05 PM PT, May 1, 2026 (Day 63). Oil prices and breaking events update multiple times daily.
